title: Price's Candles Dinner Candle, Pack of 10, White
features: WHITE DINNER CANDLES - Price's white dinner candles are available in a pack of 10 and are designed to burn for up to 7 hours! These unscented, non-drip dinner candles are the ideal dinner party accessory and household essential.

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS - Our slow burning candles are perfect for dinner dates, parties, Churches, weddings and many other special occasions! These tall candles can make any setting feel cosy and welcoming.
UNSCENTED & SMOKELESS - Made from a high-quality wax, our ivory candles are unscented and smokeless which keeps your home clean from fumes and strong smells - ideal for emergencies and everyday use.

PRICE'S - Price's are passionate about providing high-quality, long-lasting candles. We know the difference candles can make to your mood and home, that's why we continue to expand our collections and provide reliable, quality candles.
100% MONEY BACK GUARANTEE - In the unlikely event that you are unhappy with your white candles, we will provide you with a full refund in accordance with Amazon terms.
description: Product Description Prices candles CDD000628 Dinner Candle 10pk White, Prices Candles CDD000628 Dinner Candle Pack of 10- White, Prices Dinner Candle 10 pack Red, Price's Dining Candles are an elegant addition to any dining experience, Each red candle has a burn time of 7 hours, are smokeless, soot free and non-drip, 7 hour burn time per candle, 70hr total burn time,Smokeless,Soot free and non drip.
